heading: FAQ
subtitle: Everything you need to know about booking Tequila Mockingbirds.

items.question: How far do you travel?
items.answer: Based in Bearsden, we cover events in Scotland. We’re happy to travel but a small mileage fee will be applied outside G61.

items.question: Do you need access to power and water?
items.answer: All we need is access to a standard 13-amp plug socket and a 40 metre extension cable to get up and running.

items.question: Are non-alcoholic options available?
items.answer:
Yes. We offer local small-batched non-alcoholic sodas that share our ethos. Rapscallion use
 raw ingredients, never from concentrate. Pure fruit and spices.

items.question: How far in advance do I need to book?
items.answer: As we sell alcohol, by law we need an Occasional license for each event. Application times vary from council to council. We would advise as much advance warning as possible.

items.question: How much space do I need for the TM truck to access my property/venue?
items.answer: Our little truck is 4m x 2m, so we do need a bit of space to access your property. If you’re unsure about set up for your location, please don’t hesitate to mention this in your enquiry.

items.question: How do we pay for Tequila Mockingbirds?
items.answer: Once your date is secured, we will ask for a non-refundable deposit of £150. The remaining balance will be due 4 weeks prior to your event.
